rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF CONSERVATOR OF PERSON AND ESTATE
rulings.Rulings: Appearances: Sheila Robello for Petitioner Ranee Kemmerer. Franchesca Callejo for Petitioner Larry Kemmerer. Ms. Callejo informed the Court that the parties are working on trying to reach an agreement. Both Petitions for Appointment of Person and Estate of Grace Mary Tag are continued to November 17, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Investigator: Naomi Brandes. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not reported)
